memberdef.argsstring: (Credentials const &InCredentialsRef, Settings const &InSettingsRef, FHttpRetrySchedulerBase &InHttpRef, TSharedPtr< AccelByte::FApiClient, ESPMode::ThreadSafe > const &InApiClient=nullptr)
memberdef.name: Agreement

memberdef.argsstring: (Credentials const &InCredentialsRef, Settings const &InSettingsRef, FHttpRetrySchedulerBase &InHttpRef, FAccelBytePlatformPtr const &InAccelBytePlatform)
memberdef.name: Agreement

memberdef.argsstring: (EAccelByteAgreementPolicyType const &AgreementPolicyType, bool DefaultOnEmpty, THandler< TArray< FAccelByteModelsPublicPolicy > > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: GetLegalPolicies

briefdescription.para: Retrieve all active latest policies based on a namespace and country. The namespace is current client namespace. The country will be read from user token.

parameterdescription.para: Filter the responded policy by policy type. Choose the EAccelByteAgreementPolicyType::EMPTY if you want to be responded with all policy type.
Specify with true if you want to be responded with default country-specific policy if your requested country is not exist.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is a TArray<FAccelByteModelsPublicPolicy>.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &Namespace, EAccelByteAgreementPolicyType const &AgreementPolicyType, bool DefaultOnEmpty, THandler< TArray< FAccelByteModelsPublicPolicy > > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: GetLegalPolicies

briefdescription.para: Retrieve all active latest policies based on a namespace and country. The namespace can be filled with namespace or publisher namespace. The country will be read from user token.

parameterdescription.para: Filter the responded policy by namespace.
Filter the responded policy by policy type. Choose the EAccelByteAgreementPolicyType::EMPTY if you want to be responded with all policy type.
Specify with true if you want to be responded with default country-specific policy if your requested country is not exist.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is a TArray<FAccelByteModelsPublicPolicy>.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (EAccelByteAgreementPolicyType const &AgreementPolicyType, TArray< FString > const &Tags, bool DefaultOnEmpty, THandler< TArray< FAccelByteModelsPublicPolicy > > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: GetLegalPolicies

briefdescription.para: Retrieve all active latest policies based on a namespace and country. The namespace is current client namespace. The country will be read from user token.

parameterdescription.para: Filter the responded policy by policy type. Choose the EAccelByteAgreementPolicyType::EMPTY if you want to be responded with all policy type.
Filter the responded policy by tags.
Specify with true if you want to be responded with default country-specific policy if your requested country is not exist.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is a TArray<FAccelByteModelsPublicPolicy>.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &CountryCode, EAccelByteAgreementPolicyType const &AgreementPolicyType, bool DefaultOnEmpty, THandler< TArray< FAccelByteModelsPublicPolicy > > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: GetLegalPoliciesByCountry

briefdescription.para: Retrieve all active latest policies based on a country.

parameterdescription.para: Requested policy country code.
Filter the responded policy by policy type. Choose the EAccelByteAgreementPolicyType::EMPTY if you want to be responded with all policy type.
Specify with true if you want to be responded with default country-specific policy if your requested country is not exist.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is a TArray<FAccelByteModelsPublicPolicy>.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &CountryCode, EAccelByteAgreementPolicyType const &AgreementPolicyType, TArray< FString > const &Tags, bool DefaultOnEmpty, THandler< TArray< FAccelByteModelsPublicPolicy > > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: GetLegalPoliciesByCountry

briefdescription.para: Retrieve all active latest policies based on a country.

parameterdescription.para: Requested policy country code.
Filter the responded policy by policy type. Choose the EAccelByteAgreementPolicyType::EMPTY if you want to be responded with all policy type.
Filter the responded policy by tags.
Specify with true if you want to be responded with default country-specific policy if your requested country is not exist.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is a TArray<FAccelByteModelsPublicPolicy>.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &Namespace, FString const &CountryCode, EAccelByteAgreementPolicyType const &AgreementPolicyType, bool DefaultOnEmpty, THandler< TArray< FAccelByteModelsPublicPolicy > > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: GetLegalPoliciesByNamespaceAndCountry

briefdescription.para: Retrieve all active latest policies based on a country and namespace.

parameterdescription.para: Requested namespace.
Requested policy country code.
Filter the responded policy by policy type. Choose the EAccelByteAgreementPolicyType::EMPTY if you want to be responded with all policy type.
Specify with true if you want to be responded with default country-specific policy if your requested country is not exist.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is a TArray<FAccelByteModelsPublicPolicy>.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &Namespace, FString const &CountryCode, EAccelByteAgreementPolicyType const &AgreementPolicyType, TArray< FString > const &Tags, bool DefaultOnEmpty, THandler< TArray< FAccelByteModelsPublicPolicy > > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: GetLegalPoliciesByNamespaceAndCountry

briefdescription.para: Retrieve all active latest policies based on a country and namespace.

parameterdescription.para: Requested namespace.
Requested policy country code.
Filter the responded policy by policy type. Choose the EAccelByteAgreementPolicyType::EMPTY if you want to be responded with all policy type.
Filter the responded policy by tags.
Specify with true if you want to be responded with default country-specific policy if your requested country is not exist.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is a TArray<FAccelByteModelsPublicPolicy>.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (TArray< FAccelByteModelsAcceptAgreementRequest > const &AgreementRequests, THandler< FAccelByteModelsAcceptAgreementResponse > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: BulkAcceptPolicyVersions

briefdescription.para: Accepts many legal policy versions all at once. Supply with localized version policy id to accept an agreement.

parameterdescription.para: List of localized policy versions to accept.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is an FAccelByteModelsAcceptAgreementResponse.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

parameterdescription.para: This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is an FAccelByteModelsAcceptAgreementResponse.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

briefdescription.para: Accepts a legal policy version. Supply with localized version policy id to accept an agreement.

parameterdescription.para: A localized policy version Id to accept.
This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (TArray< FAccelByteModelsChangeAgreementRequest > const &ChangeAgreementRequests, FVoidHandler const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: ChangePolicyPreferences

briefdescription.para: Accept or changes preference to specific legal policy versions.

parameterdescription.para: Request for localized policy version id to change.
This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &Namespace, THandler< TArray< FAccelByteModelsRetrieveUserEligibilitiesResponse > > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: QueryLegalEligibilities

briefdescription.para: Query all player's legal eligibilities on a namespace, use to check is player already commited to legal or not.

parameterdescription.para: Filter the eligibilities by namespace.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is a TArray<RetrieveUserEligibilitiesResponse>.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &Url, THandler< FString > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: GetLegalDocument

briefdescription.para: Get the content of the legal document.

parameterdescription.para: The url of the legal document, you can get it from GetLegalPolicies query.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is a string.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

briefdescription.para: Agreement API to obtain and accept legal in a namespace.
